settingsToggleDescription: Track this campaign's official achievements as you play. Unlocks are recorded to your account and shown in the campaign log.

campaigns.50: Return to the Night of the Zealot
campaigns.52: Return to The Path to Carcosa

TheZealotsRevenge.name: The Zealot's Revenge
TheZealotsRevenge.text: Have Lita Chantler's reaction ability deal the killing blow to the Ghoul Priest.

IDontTrustHer.name: I Don't Trust Her
IDontTrustHer.text: When given the option to add Lita Chantler to your deck, refuse to do so.

InsuranceDoesntCoverGhouls.name: Insurance Doesn't Cover Ghouls
InsuranceDoesntCoverGhouls.text: Burn your house to the ground in The Gathering.

ButDoIHaveTo.name: …But Do I Have To?
ButDoIHaveTo.text: In The Midnight Masks, have each investigator remain in Your House for the first three rounds.

ConspiracyOfSilence.name: Conspiracy of Silence
ConspiracyOfSilence.text: Find and interrogate all six unique cultists in The Midnight Masks.

TourOfArkham.name: Tour of Arkham
TourOfArkham.text: Trigger each of the "once per game" abilities on all of the locations in play in The Midnight Masks.

DoYouGetItNow.name: Do You Get It Now?
DoYouGetItNow.text: Trigger the Forced ability on Billy Cooper by defeating the Ghoul Priest at his location.

PinchHitter.name: Pinch Hitter
PinchHitter.text: Defeat three Ghoul enemies with a Baseball Bat without it breaking.

EvenDeathMayDie.name: Even Death May Die
EvenDeathMayDie.text: Defeat Umôrdhoth while the Vault of Earthly Demise is attached to it.

BreakTheCircle.name: Break the Circle
BreakTheCircle.text: Complete The Devourer Below without Umôrdhoth spawning.

TheyreJustMisunderstood.name: They're Just Misunderstood
TheyreJustMisunderstood.text: Win the Night of the Zealot campaign without defeating a single unique Cultist enemy.

UmordhothsFavor.name: Umôrdhoth's Favor
UmordhothsFavor.text: Win the Night of the Zealot campaign without defeating a single Ghoul enemy.

ZealotLineInTheSand.name: Line in the Sand
ZealotLineInTheSand.text: Win the Night of the Zealot campaign with at least three Ultimatums active.

ArkhamExpertise.name: Arkham Expertise
ArkhamExpertise.text: Win the Night of the Zealot campaign on Expert difficulty.

WhatIsThisStuffAnyway.name: What Is This Stuff, Anyway?
WhatIsThisStuffAnyway.text: Defeat The Experiment using the Alchemical Concoction in Extracurricular Activities.

NoVoidForYou.name: No Void For You
NoVoidForYou.text: Complete The Miskatonic Museum without ever defeating the Hunting Horror.

FirstRuleOfArkham.name: First Rule of Arkham
FirstRuleOfArkham.text: Burn the Necronomicon in The Miskatonic Museum.

AllAboard.name: All Aboard
AllAboard.text: Complete The Essex County Express without letting any Helpless Passengers leave play.

TheGangsAllHere.name: The Gang's All Here
TheGangsAllHere.text: In The Survivors, have the following characters survive The Dunwich Legacy:

NoBroodLeftBehind.name: No Brood Left Behind
NoBroodLeftBehind.text: Have no Broods of Yog-Sothoth escape into the wild in Undimensioned and Unseen.

RemindMeNotToPissHerOff.name: Remind Me Not To Piss Her Off
RemindMeNotToPissHerOff.text: Defeat either version of Seth Bishop while Naomi O'Bannion is under your control.

BeyondWhatVeil.name: Beyond What Veil?
BeyondWhatVeil.text: Take 10 damage from Beyond the Veil without being defeated.

HereWeGoAgain.name: Here We Go Again
HereWeGoAgain.text: Have Dr. Henry Armitage, Dr. Francis Morgan, and Professor Warren Rice in play at the same time.

BirdHunting.name: Bird Hunting
BirdHunting.text: Defeat 3 Whippoorwills in a single turn.

TheyArentGettingAwayWithThis.name: They Aren't Getting Away With This
TheyArentGettingAwayWithThis.text: Win The Dunwich Legacy campaign as "Ashcan" Pete with Duke listed under "Sacrificed to Yog-Sothoth."

TabulaRasa.name: Tabula Rasa
TabulaRasa.text: Win The Dunwich Legacy campaign with no Tablet or Elder Thing tokens in the chaos bag.

DunwichLineInTheSand.name: Line in the Sand
DunwichLineInTheSand.text: Win The Dunwich Legacy campaign with at least three Ultimatums active.

DunwichExpertise.name: Dunwich Expertise
DunwichExpertise.text: Win The Dunwich Legacy campaign on Expert difficulty.

FairWarning.name: Fair Warning
FairWarning.text: Defeat the Royal Emissary three times during a single playthrough of Curtain Call.

FirstSteps.name: First Steps
FirstSteps.text: Interview the following VIPs in The Last King:

CrashingTheParty.name: Crashing the Party
CrashingTheParty.text: Defeat the Lunatic version of Dianne Devine in The Last King.

ForPryingEyes.name: For Prying Eyes
ForPryingEyes.text: Add the Hidden Library to the victory display in Echoes of the Past.

TheCuckoosNest.name: The Cuckoo's Nest
TheCuckoosNest.text: Resign with Daniel Chesterfield under an investigator's control in The Unspeakable Oath.

TakeALookAtThis.name: Take a Look at This!
TakeALookAtThis.text: Parley with the Host of Insanity in The Unspeakable Oath.

ThePathOfDeath.name: The Path of Death
ThePathOfDeath.text: Use your Clasp of Black Onyx to find a shortcut in The Pallid Mask.

GuessingGame.name: Guessing Game
GuessingGame.text: Advance to the final agenda of one agenda deck before advancing the first agenda of the other agenda deck in Black Stars Rise.

HasturMadeMeDoIt.name: Hastur Made Me Do It
HasturMadeMeDoIt.text: Defeat Hastur in Dim Carcosa while a Possession treachery is in your hand.

SayMyName.name: Say My Name
SayMyName.text: After you have heeded Daniel's warning, speak the name of HASTUR aloud seven or more times during a single scenario (or its setup).

GetBackHere.name: Get Back Here
GetBackHere.text: Win The Path to Carcosa campaign having never ended a scenario with The Man in the Pallid Mask in play.

ThePathIsFalse.name: The Path is False
ThePathIsFalse.text: Win The Path to Carcosa campaign with 8 Doubt.

ThePathIsReal.name: The Path is Real
ThePathIsReal.text: Win The Path to Carcosa campaign with 8 Conviction.

ThePathIsMine.name: The Path is Mine
ThePathIsMine.text: Win The Path to Carcosa campaign with less than 2 Doubt and Conviction in total.

CarcosaLineInTheSand.name: Line in the Sand
CarcosaLineInTheSand.text: Win The Path to Carcosa campaign with at least three Ultimatums active.

CarcosaExpertise.name: Carcosa Expertise
CarcosaExpertise.text: Win The Path to Carcosa campaign on Expert difficulty.

WhyDidItHaveToBeSnakes.name: Why Did It Have to Be Snakes?
WhyDidItHaveToBeSnakes.text: Defeat twenty Serpent enemies across The Forgotten Age campaign.

WatchThemUnravel.name: Watch Them Unravel
WatchThemUnravel.text: Complete all four act decks during a single playthrough of Threads of Fate.

HopeForHumanity.name: Hope for Humanity
HopeForHumanity.text: Restore Ichtaca's faith in humanity in The Boundary Beyond.

Scenario5What.name: Scenario 5-What?
Scenario5What.text: Skip Heart of the Elders, Part 1.

BeyondPerfection.name: Beyond Perfection
BeyondPerfection.text: Complete all eight tasks on act 2 of The City of Archives during a single playthrough.

IRememberEverything.name: I Remember Everything!
IRememberEverything.text: Restore Alejandro's memories in The City of Archives.

Patricide.name: Patricide
Patricide.text: Defeat Yig in The Depths of Yoth.

HesGotAPoint.name: He's Got a Point
HesGotAPoint.text: Side with Alejandro in Shattered Aeons.

ValusiaSoundsGreat.name: Valusia Sounds Great
ValusiaSoundsGreat.text: Side with Ichtaca in Shattered Aeons.

IveBuiltUpAnImmunity.name: I've Built Up An Immunity
IveBuiltUpAnImmunity.text: Win The Forgotten Age campaign without ever becoming poisoned.

WeHaveAnUnderstanding.name: We Have an Understanding
WeHaveAnUnderstanding.text: Win The Forgotten Age campaign without ever dealing any damage to the Harbinger of Valusia.

WhoNeedsAnyOfThisJunk.name: Who Needs Any of This Junk?
WhoNeedsAnyOfThisJunk.text: Win The Forgotten Age campaign without purchasing any supplies.

DontTreadOnMe.name: Don't Tread on Me
DontTreadOnMe.text: Win The Forgotten Age campaign with no tally marks recorded under Yig's Fury in your Campaign Log.

BaneOfYig.name: Bane of Yig
BaneOfYig.text: Win The Forgotten Age campaign with 25 or more tally marks recorded under Yig's Fury in your Campaign Log.

IfICouldTurnBackTime.name: If I Could Turn Back Time
IfICouldTurnBackTime.text: Forge your own path, unlock Scenario IX, and win The Forgotten Age campaign.

YothExpertise.name: Yoth Expertise
YothExpertise.text: Win The Forgotten Age campaign on Expert difficulty.

WhoYouGonnaCall.name: Who You Gonna Call?
WhoYouGonnaCall.text: Defeat 13 Geist or Spectral enemies across the campaign. Enemies who are not discarded or added to the victory display do not count.

SaviorOfHumanity.name: Savior of Humanity
SaviorOfHumanity.text: Rescue every Silver Twilight enemy who appears in At Death's Doorstep.

TenOutOfTenWouldReadAgain.name: 10/10 Would Read Again
TenOutOfTenWouldReadAgain.text: Using The Black Book, take a total of 10 horror with its ability throughout the campaign.

CarlShmarl.name: Carl Shmarl
CarlShmarl.text: Become part of the Silver Twilight Lodge's Inner Circle, then betray them in Union and Disillusion.

TheThreefoldRule.name: The Threefold Rule
TheThreefoldRule.text: Join forces with Erynn and turn on her coven in Union and Disillusion.

NewWorldOrder.name: New World Order
NewWorldOrder.text: Help the Silver Twilight Lodge win The Circle Undone campaign.

ImmortalitySoundsNice.name: Immortality Sounds Nice
ImmortalitySoundsNice.text: Help Anette's Coven win The Circle Undone campaign.

MoreLikeExcursion.name: More Like Excursion
MoreLikeExcursion.text: Complete In the Clutches of Chaos without a single incursion occurring.

MemberThese.name: 'Member These?
MemberThese.text: Discover all ten Mementos: the Mesmerizing Flute, Ritual Components, Scrap of Torn Shadow, Strange Incantation, Gilman's Journal, Keziah's Formulae, Worn Crucifix, Wisp of Spectral Mist, Corn Husk Doll, and Bloody Tree Carvings.

CaseClosed.name: Case Closed
CaseClosed.text: Save each of Valentino Rivas, Gavriella Mizrah, Penny White, and Jerome Davids from a terrible fate.

MusicOfTheOuterGods.name: Music of the Outer Gods
MusicOfTheOuterGods.text: Accept your fate and win The Circle Undone campaign by joining the Pipers of Azathoth.

WeaverOfShadowAndMist.name: Weaver of Shadow and Mist
WeaverOfShadowAndMist.text: Reject your fate and win The Circle Undone campaign by crafting a spell to contain Azathoth.

FinePrint.name: Fine Print
FinePrint.text: Win The Circle Undone campaign by signing your name in The Black Book of Azathoth.

SpeakTheWordsAloud.name: duolA sdroW eht kaepS
SpeakTheWordsAloud.text: Win The Circle Undone campaign by discovering and reversing an ancient incantation.

CircleExpertise.name: Circle Expertise
CircleExpertise.text: Win The Circle Undone campaign on Expert difficulty.

clearAllConfirm: Clear ALL earned achievements? This cannot be undone.
clearCampaignConfirm: Clear all earned achievements for {campaign}? This cannot be undone.
clearOneConfirm: Clear the achievement "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
